initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
GROUP BY p.player_name, p.player_api_id, p.height
HAVING p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
   OR p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
ORDER BY p.height DESC, AVG(pa.finishing) DESC
LIMIT 1;
